message:
chore(deps,harness): update Cargo.lock, refine E2E log schema, and sync beads

- Cargo.lock: dependency resolution update reflecting workspace
  changes from concurrent agent work
- crates/fsqlite-harness/src/e2e_log_schema.rs: refine E2E log schema
  definitions with updated field validation rules
- .beads/issues.jsonl: sync issue tracker with latest state

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
